title: Missing verifier script: passed=false AND error='source_unavailable'
description: SPEC.md §7.4 + §13.1.18: when a verifier's source can't be located (e.g., shell exit 127 'command not found'), the runner MUST emit verifier_evaluated with passed=false AND error='source_unavailable'. This distinguishes a broken environment from a legitimate rule failure so consumers don't conflate them. The same Config in two deployments — one with the script present, one without — would otherwise be indistinguishable on the wire.
